creator: dfilter@FreeBSD.ORG
text:
Author: wg
Date: Sat Nov  2 12:53:32 2013
New Revision: 332476
URL: http://svnweb.freebsd.org/changeset/ports/332476

Log:
  devel/oniguruma5: update to 5.9.5
  
  - Update to 5.9.5
  - Allow staging
  - Remove useless LICENSE_FILE [1]
  
  PR:		ports/183559
  Submitted by:	KATO Tsuguru <tkato432 yahoo.com>, wg [1]

Modified:
  head/devel/oniguruma5/Makefile
  head/devel/oniguruma5/distinfo

Modified: head/devel/oniguruma5/Makefile
==============================================================================
--- head/devel/oniguruma5/Makefile	Sat Nov  2 12:50:28 2013	(r332475)
+++ head/devel/oniguruma5/Makefile	Sat Nov  2 12:53:32 2013	(r332476)
@@ -2,9 +2,10 @@
 # $FreeBSD$
 
 PORTNAME=	oniguruma
-PORTVERSION=	5.9.4
+PORTVERSION=	5.9.5
 CATEGORIES=	devel textproc
 MASTER_SITES=	http://www.geocities.jp/kosako3/oniguruma/archive/
+PKGNAMESUFFIX=	5
 DISTNAME=	onig-${PORTVERSION}
 DIST_SUBDIR=	ruby
 
@@ -12,19 +13,15 @@ MAINTAINER=	ports@FreeBSD.org
 COMMENT=	BSDL Regular Expressions library compatible with POSIX/GNU/Perl
 
 LICENSE=	BSD
-LICENSE_FILE=	${WRKSRC}/COPYING
 
 OPTIONS_DEFINE=	DOCS EXAMPLES
 
 CONFLICTS=	oniguruma-2.*
 
-PKGNAMESUFFIX=	5
-
 USES=		pathfix
 GNU_CONFIGURE=	yes
 USE_LDCONFIG=	yes
 
-NO_STAGE=	yes
 .include <bsd.port.options.mk>
 
 post-patch:
@@ -33,14 +30,10 @@ post-patch:
 		 s|$$(<)|$$(@).in|' ${WRKSRC}/Makefile.in
 
 post-install:
-.if ${PORT_OPTIONS:MDOCS}
-	@${MKDIR} ${DOCSDIR}
-	(cd ${WRKSRC} && ${INSTALL_DATA} HISTORY README ${DOCSDIR})
-	(cd ${WRKSRC}/doc && ${INSTALL_DATA} * ${DOCSDIR})
-.endif
-.if ${PORT_OPTIONS:MEXAMPLES}
-	@${MKDIR} ${EXAMPLESDIR}
-	(cd ${WRKSRC}/sample && ${INSTALL_DATA} *.c ${EXAMPLESDIR})
-.endif
+	@${MKDIR} ${STAGEDIR}${DOCSDIR}
+	(cd ${WRKSRC} && ${INSTALL_DATA} HISTORY README ${STAGEDIR}${DOCSDIR})
+	(cd ${WRKSRC}/doc && ${INSTALL_DATA} * ${STAGEDIR}${DOCSDIR})
+	@${MKDIR} ${STAGEDIR}${EXAMPLESDIR}
+	(cd ${WRKSRC}/sample && ${INSTALL_DATA} *.c ${STAGEDIR}${EXAMPLESDIR})
 
 .include <bsd.port.mk>

Modified: head/devel/oniguruma5/distinfo
==============================================================================
--- head/devel/oniguruma5/distinfo	Sat Nov  2 12:50:28 2013	(r332475)
+++ head/devel/oniguruma5/distinfo	Sat Nov  2 12:53:32 2013	(r332476)
@@ -1,2 +1,2 @@
-SHA256 (ruby/onig-5.9.4.tar.gz) = 988221911ff865941a859096c39a532df77418cb6df513857428a41605130697
-SIZE (ruby/onig-5.9.4.tar.gz) = 567985
+SHA256 (ruby/onig-5.9.5.tar.gz) = 9f49ae7819a5f47e25449d0e4b010d479f7868a24a7b9884b47041b49a76438a
+SIZE (ruby/onig-5.9.5.tar.gz) = 587874
